subcodes.first_line: O Lord, Thou dost witness and behold Thy solitary servant, alone amidst diverse peoples, captive in the hands of his enemies, abased [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای رب تشاهد و تری عبدک الوحید فریدا بین ملل شتی اسیرا بین یدی الاعداء ذلیلا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for opponents; enemies of the Faith, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance
